title: FAMtastic Studio Operations Workspace GUI
label: ops-workspace-gui

source.summary: Design session covering Agent Management + Job Management GUI for FAMtastic Studio. Produced UX strategy, IA, screen specs for 11 Ops tabs (Pulse, Plans, Tasks, Jobs, Runs, Proofs, Agents, Reviews, Gaps, Memory, Debt), record-type visual language (PLAN/TASK/JOB/RUN/PROOF/GAP/MEMORY/REVIEW), CLI/ledger seam, ASCII wireframes, and MVP recommendation.

goals: Add an Operations workspace to the Workbench shell that unifies agent, job, plan, task, run, proof, gap, memory, review, and debt surfaces.
Resolve the stale-debt confusion by physically quarantining legacy queue items from live work.
Establish a record-type visual language (color, glyph, shape, route) so PLAN/TASK/JOB/RUN/PROOF/GAP/MEMORY/REVIEW are instantly distinguishable.
Wire the GUI to existing ledgers and CLI via a single ops API surface so CLI and UI stay in lock-step.
Make Shay-Shay a context-aware narrator on top of visible state, never a replacement for it.

workstreams.title: Phase 0 — Ops State Contract (must precede all UI work)
workstreams.description: Foundational contracts that prevent the original 'false agents waiting' bug from recurring under a different surface. No UI work begins until Phase 0 acceptance is met.
outputs: Source-of-truth matrix — concrete table baked into this plan (see source_of_truth_matrix below); docs/ops/state-contract.md mirrors it for human reading
Current debt inventory — actual counts at time of build, not historical estimates (snapshot script in scripts/ops/inventory.js, output committed to docs/ops/inventory-YYYY-MM-DD.json)
Freshness derivation rules — concrete table baked into this plan (see freshness_derivation_table below); freshness is always computed from (status, age_seconds), never stored.

Destructive-action policy — Purge, Cancel-running, Archive-with-data-loss, Promote-to-Task, and any /api/ops/command/* that mutates >1 record require gate matching plans/registry.json governance.hard_stop_conditions
API snapshot schema — every GET /api/ops/* response includes {snapshot_version, generated_at, source_ledgers[], record_count}
WS reconcile contract — every /ws/ops topic includes {snapshot_version, sequence_id}; client reconciles against GET /api/ops/* on reconnect or sequence gap

Cross-link schema additions — task records gain origin_job_id and promoted_from; job records gain promoted_to_task_id; review records gain reviews_record_id and reviews_record_type; gap records gain converted_to_task_id

plan.precedence_rule: registry.json wins; plan_*/plan.json is detail-only and merged in

task.precedence_rule: tasks.jsonl wins; site-studio/public/data/workbench-plan-state.json is a derived mirror, never authoritative

job.precedence_rule: SQLite wins for live state; jobs.jsonl is the durable append log; on conflict, replay log into SQLite and snapshot

proof.precedence_rule: proof-ledger.jsonl wins; physical artifacts under proofs/ are immutable

gap.precedence_rule: gaps.jsonl wins; SITE-LEARNINGS.md known-gaps section is a derived human view

memory.precedence_rule: cerebrum.md wins for Do-Not-Repeat and Decisions; memory/*.md wins for typed entries; conflict surfaces a Review

review.precedence_rule: reviews.jsonl wins; per-round review packets stored under proofs/reviews/

debt.precedence_rule: Latest dated inventory wins; older snapshots are historical only

legacy_queue.precedence_rule: Read-only; lives only in Stale Debt drawer; never enters live lanes

freshness_derivation_table.invariant: freshness in {parked, archived, stale} can NEVER appear in any 'live' count, lane, or KPI tile. Enforced by tests/ops/stale-cannot-inflate-live.test.js.

acceptance: source_of_truth_matrix above is the contract — docs/ops/state-contract.md is generated from it.
freshness_derivation_table above is the contract — tests/ops/freshness-derivation.test.js asserts every (type, status, age) tuple matches.
scripts/ops/inventory.js produces a JSON snapshot of every ledger with real counts (not stubs).
tests/ops/stale-cannot-inflate-live.test.js proves no stale or parked record can appear in live counts under any sequence of mutations.
tests/ops/ws-reconcile.test.js simulates WS disconnect + sequence gap and proves client recovers without count drift.
Every /api/ops/command/* destructive action errors when called without matching governance approval token.

workstreams.title: Ops API Surface (read + command + stream)
outputs: GET /api/ops/* read endpoints (jobs, runs, tasks, plans, proofs, gaps, memory, reviews, debt, needsMe) — every response carries snapshot_version + generated_at + source_ledgers + record_count
POST /api/ops/command/* command endpoints (approve, reroute, park, retry, cancel, promote, archive, purge, migrate) — destructive actions require governance approval token
WS /ws/ops topic stream with snapshot_version + sequence_id on every message; reconnect/replay/snapshot-fetch contract documented

needsMe endpoint backed by reviews/* ledger; reviews endpoint backed by reviews/* ledger; gaps endpoint backed by docs/ops/gaps.jsonl; memory endpoint backed by .wolf/cerebrum.md + memory/* — each declared in the source-of-truth matrix
Per-endpoint contract test asserting it reads the ledger named in the source-of-truth matrix and no other
acceptance: Every UI action has a CLI-equivalent command hitting the same endpoint.
Freshness field appears on every record but is computed via Phase 0 derivation rules — never stored.
WS client reconnects after sleep without any lane count drift, verified by tests/ops/ws-reconcile.test.js.
No /api/ops/command/* destructive endpoint can run without the governance approval token.

workstreams.title: Jobs Tab MVP (seven lanes + Stale Debt drawer)
outputs: Seven swimlanes mapped 1:1 to existing job DB statuses (no new stored statuses introduced): Queued ← pending, Approving ← approved, Running ← running, Blocked ← blocked, Done ← done, Failed ← failed, Parked ← parked. 'Approving' is a UI label for the existing 'approved' status, not a new state.
Stale Debt drawer (collapsed bottom) with Migrate, Archive, and Purge — all three required in MVP, all three gated by destructive-action policy
Job inspector (right slide-over) with cost, deps, log tail, cancel/park/promote-to-task
Promote-to-Task writes task with origin_job_id; job updates promoted_to_task_id; both visible in inspector
WebSocket live updates with reconcile contract; Shay-Shay one-sentence queue summary refreshed against API on reconnect, never from cached WS
acceptance: Stale Debt drawer count matches docs/ops/inventory-YYYY-MM-DD.json snapshot for legacy queue source — no hardcoded numbers in code or docs.
Failed jobs render in Failed lane, not silently dropped or merged into Done.
Approve/Park/Cancel reflect optimistically and reconcile with server within one round-trip.
Promote-to-Task is reversible: task gains origin_job_id, job gains promoted_to_task_id, undo restores both.
tests/ops/stale-cannot-inflate-live.test.js passes against the live Jobs API.
Manual Playwright proof: disconnect WS for 60s, reconnect, lane counts match GET /api/ops/jobs exactly.

workstreams.title: Pulse Tab (home view)
outputs: Needs Me strip (left)
KPI tiles + Live Activity ticker (middle)
In Flight plans (right)
Recent proofs footer strip

workstreams.title: Tasks Tab (kanban with Waiting-on-me / Waiting-on-agent split)
outputs: Seven-column board with distinct amber/blue stripes for Waiting columns
Task inspector with acceptance criteria + proof attachment
Done-without-proof yellow badge

workstreams.title: Agents Tab (Command Center)
outputs: Roster with avatars, role badges, status dots, today's stats
Detail tabs: Now, Skills, History, Reliability, Approvals, Policy
Live log tail for selected agent
Autonomy slider + budget caps + permission revoke

workstreams.title: Reviews Tab (approval gates)
outputs: Polymorphic preview (diff, screenshot pair, research packet, deploy plan)
Approve / Reject / Approve-with-edits / Send-back / Convert-to-rule

workstreams.title: Proofs Tab (evidence library)
outputs: Faceted masonry gallery
Compare-two viewer
Promote-to-reference, attach-to-task

workstreams.title: Runs Tab (execution history)
outputs: Dense virtualized table
Run inspector with streaming log + cost-per-step
Rerun and rerun-with-edits

workstreams.title: Plans Tab (registry + roadmap)
outputs: Card grid + Roadmap timeline toggle
Plan inspector with milestones, nested tasks, proof strip

workstreams.title: Gaps Tab
outputs: Grouped list with recurrence sparklines
Convert-to-task and Promote-to-Do-Not-Repeat

workstreams.title: Memory Tab (learning library)
outputs: Type tabs: Facts, Decisions, Preferences, Bugs, Gaps-resolved, Do-Not-Repeat, Rules
Still-true / Correct / Retire lifecycle controls
Weekly digest pinned by Shay-Shay

workstreams.title: Debt Tab (migration + cleanup)
outputs: Source tiles (legacy queue, schema drift, deprecated formats, orphaned proofs)
Dry-run preview + Migrate/Archive/Purge actions

workstreams.title: Record-Type Visual Language
outputs: Glyph + accent color + card shape + route prefix per type (PLAN ◇ indigo, TASK ☐ slate, JOB ▶ amber, RUN ● cyan, PROOF ▣ emerald, GAP △ coral, MEMORY ✦ violet, REVIEW ⛔ red-orange)
Cross-reference chip component shared across inspectors

workstreams.title: Plan Creation GUI + Purpose Capture
outputs: 'New Plan' action on Plans tab opens a right-side composer (not a modal)
Required fields: title, purpose (why this exists), origin (conversation|gap|proof|manual), success_signal, owner
Optional fields: why_now, initial workstreams, tags, label
Auto-link to trigger record when launched from a gap/proof/conversation card
Plan record schema additions: purpose, why_now, origin.trigger_record, success_signal
Same composer reachable from Pulse 'Needs Me', Gaps 'Convert to Plan', and Shay-Shay 'Draft a plan'
acceptance: No plan can be saved without a non-empty purpose.
Plans converted from a gap auto-populate origin.trigger_record with the gap id.
Shay-Shay can narrate any plan in one sentence using purpose + success_signal.
CLI parity: `fam-hub plan new` accepts the same fields and writes the same shape.

workstreams.title: Ops Test Substrate (regression-proofing the original bug)
workstreams.description: Tests that prove the 'false agents waiting' bug cannot recur under any sequence of mutations. Required because the origin of this entire plan was a false-positive indicator.
outputs: tests/ops/fixtures/ — synthetic ledger fixtures including stale, parked, archived, and live records of every type
tests/ops/stale-cannot-inflate-live.test.js — property tests asserting freshness derivation never marks parked/archived as live across 1000+ mutation sequences
tests/ops/freshness-derivation.test.js — pinned table of (status, age) → freshness for every record type
tests/ops/ws-reconcile.test.js — disconnect/replay/snapshot-fetch correctness
tests/ops/destructive-action-gate.test.js — every command endpoint refuses without governance approval token
tests/ops/cross-link-integrity.test.js — promote/convert actions write both sides of the link or fail atomically
acceptance: All Ops test files run in CI; failure blocks merge.
No Ops UI workstream may declare 'done' without its corresponding test in this substrate passing.

workstreams.title: Adversarial Review Loop (Reviews tab feature)
workstreams.description: Cross-agent adversarial review of plans, specs, diffs, and proofs. If Claude authored, Codex reviews. If Codex authored, Claude reviews. Optional third pass by Gemini. Loop continues until stop condition met. Fully configurable, fully optional — single toggle disables it system-wide.
outputs: Reviews tab 'Run adversarial review' action on any reviewable record (plan, spec, diff, proof, research packet)
Reviewer assignment rules: author_agent != reviewer_agent (configurable matrix)
Loop runner with rounds, amendments, re-reviews, and convergence detection
Per-record review history pane showing each round's findings + amendments + diff
Final verdict surfaced on the original record (ship | amend | reject)

configuration.per_record_override: record can opt out via skip_adversarial_review: true

stop_conditions.convergence: stop when reviewer says ship-as-is OR no new critical issues
stop_conditions.manual_halt: user can stop the loop at any round from the Reviews tab

reviewer_matrix.note: Pairs and order are user-configurable per record type

acceptance: Global toggle disables the entire loop in one setting; no review jobs created when off.
Per-record opt-out respected even when global toggle is on.
Loop never runs author == reviewer; runtime errors instead of silently passing.
Each round writes a review packet to proofs/ and links back to the source record.
Final verdict and full round history visible on the source record forever.
Manual halt from Reviews tab stops the loop within one round.
CLI parity: fam-hub review run <record-id> --rounds N --reviewers codex,gemini

workstreams.title: Shay-Shay Drawer Integration (read-only first)
outputs: Per-tab context briefings driven by same ops APIs the UI uses
Recommendation chips (no auto-actions in MVP)
Inspector-collapses-Shay rail behavior

mvp.phase_0_required_first: ws_phase0_state_contract and ws_ops_test_substrate must complete before MVP work begins. No exceptions.
mvp.rationale: Resolves the legacy worker-queue stale-state confusion (current real inventory: see docs/ops/inventory snapshot, not the historical 448 figure), validates the swimlane + inspector + WebSocket reconcile pattern reused across every other tab, and exposes the SQLite jobs + legacy worker-queue seam through a single visual with regression tests preventing the original 'false agents waiting' bug.
scope: Seven lanes wired live (Queued, Approving, Running, Blocked, Done, Failed, Parked)
Stale Debt drawer with Migrate, Archive, and Purge — all three required, all gated by destructive-action policy
Job inspector with Cancel/Park/Promote-to-Task (Promote writes both sides of cross-link)
WebSocket lane updates with reconcile contract (snapshot_version + sequence_id)
Shay-Shay one-sentence queue summary refreshed against API on reconnect, never from cached WS
All ws_ops_test_substrate tests green against the live Jobs API

deliverables_already_produced: Per-screen layout specs (regions, panels, components, sample content, empty states, actions, Shay-Shay role)
ASCII wireframes for Pulse, Jobs, Tasks
known_gaps_opened: No ops API surface exists yet — must be built before any Ops tab.
Source-of-truth matrix is defined in ws_phase0_state_contract.source_of_truth_matrix; docs/ops/state-contract.md (the human-readable mirror) does not yet exist — Phase 0 must generate it.

Real current ledger inventory (2026-05-05): tasks 34, runs 1, proofs 27, legacy worker-queue backup 9 lines. The historical '448 stale jobs' figure is no longer accurate; UI must read the live inventory snapshot, never a hardcoded number.

Freshness must be derived from existing status + age, not stored as a parallel field. Existing statuses: tasks (completed|blocked), proofs (passed|recorded|passed_with_blockers|blocked), runs (active), jobs (pending|blocked|approved|parked|running|done|failed).
No WebSocket /ws/ops channel is implemented yet (the reconcile/replay/snapshot contract is now defined in ws_phase0_state_contract — implementation remains).
Cross-link fields (origin_job_id, promoted_to_task_id, promoted_from, converted_to_task_id, reviews_record_id) do not yet exist in any ledger schema.
No destructive-action gate matches plans/registry.json governance.hard_stop_conditions for Ops command endpoints.
No regression tests exist proving stale/parked records cannot inflate live counts — required before any UI ships.
Record-type visual language not yet codified in design tokens.
Job lane to DB-status mapping was incomplete in v1 (no Failed lane); now corrected to seven lanes.

amendments.summary: Added Phase 0 state contract (ws_phase0_state_contract) and Ops test substrate (ws_ops_test_substrate) as P0 dependencies before any UI work. Added Failed lane (seven total). Replaced hardcoded 448 with live inventory snapshot. Added Migrate to MVP scope. Added cross-link schema fields. Added destructive-action gate. Added WS reconcile contract. Made freshness derived not stored. Updated known_gaps_opened with real inventory numbers.

Baked the source_of_truth_matrix and freshness_derivation_table directly into the Phase 0 workstream — they are now contracts inside plan.json, not aspirational outputs. Clarified that 'Approving' is a UI label for the existing 'approved' job status, not a new stored state. Reworded WS gap to distinguish 'not implemented' from 'not defined'.

All round-2 issues confirmed addressed. Removed self-contradicting known_gaps_opened entry that still claimed 'no source-of-truth matrix exists' after the matrix was added in round 2. Loop reached 3-round default cap; remaining concerns are cosmetic, not architectural. Plan is implementation-ready pending the planned Phase 0 work.
